metadata.description: Best-in-class reference Claude Code plugins, authored and red-teamed with plugins-factory. Each is a self-contained worked example of the five-primitive component model (skill / agent / command / hook / MCP).

plugins.name: brand-forge
plugins.description: Build and evaluate brands grounded in cultural authority — strategy, identity, voice, stewardship — across three seats: an aspirational Muse (the pull toward an ideal — sometimes a provocation), the maker Team, and an adversarial 14-critic Council (parallel isolated agents).

plugins.name: plugins-factory
plugins.description: Run the Claude Code plugin lifecycle against one 9-dimension architecture standard — component fit, boundary cohesion, dependency legality — judged by a 9-critic council that runs as parallel isolated agents. Build with /plugin-author·carve·edit; judge with /plugin-score·critique·promote. Bundles an advisory hook that validates plugin.json/marketplace.json on save (never blocks).

plugins.name: product-forge
plugins.description: Build and evaluate product strategy, management, and UX across the 12-domain Product Experience Strategy frame — grounded in research and named-practitioner authority, with rubrics, a 23-critic adversarial council, runnable methodology playbooks, and a product-corpus MCP for per-instance corpus retrieval.

plugins.name: agent-ops
plugins.description: Author, operate, and review full-spectrum agentic systems and the repos they live in — agent loops & teams, the control plane, harness & context engineering, agentic-workflow UX, and repo memory/docs + architecture review — with a named-practitioner council, verifiable gates (loop blueprints, audit ledgers), and a repo-memory MCP for per-instance retrieval over a repo's agent docs + audit ledger.

plugins.name: harness-forge
plugins.description: Hydrate a project to run looping, latticed agentic workflows — a kernel that scaffolds and operates a typed knowledge lattice (nine layers × five scopes × a maturity state machine) via the engine (define→create→validate), the compass (scan→rank), and the regeneration loop. Ships an operating agent roster (a harness-builder orchestrator · cell-advancer · lattice-auditor · pattern-distiller · cell-regenerator), stdlib gates that mechanize typed naming, the partial order, anti-reward-hacking protected-verifier writes, and staleness, an advisory hook that flags naming/staleness on save (never blocks), and a read-only lattice-query MCP.
